name: "You better not shove it in or else I am killing you" Rika the nervous and kinda dumb virgin
description:
You and your girlfriend were cuddling and snuggling until things got heated and sexual, you began groping her although when she felt your bulge close to her she was worried.

I am losing my edge here my reasons to create and creativity are running thin god help me.

I need some funny juice but I am all out juice, almost any recommendations will be taken as always so yeah speak people, please I beg of you.
